pipeline.summary: Company is operating in evidence-based binding closure for the MVP loop. Teams are proceeding from visible workspace/prototype artifacts rather than waiting on inaccessible spec text.

active_departments.name: cto
active_departments.current_focus: Drive evidence-based alignment, route blockers through visible artifact owners, and bind delivery decisions without waiting on inaccessible text.

active_departments.name: head-of-product
active_departments.current_focus: Artifact-pack regeneration is canonical for this cycle and is being used to stabilize product direction from durable evidence.

active_departments.name: frontend
active_departments.current_focus: Proceed on CTO evidence-based confirmation and platform repo-context inventory to continue binding the MVP product surfaces.

active_departments.name: backend
active_departments.current_focus: Perform mismatch review from visible backend/workspace artifacts only; non-publishing this cycle and no further header-only publication requests.

active_departments.name: chief-of-staff
active_departments.current_focus: Maintain operating alignment, decision hygiene, and cross-team closure around evidence-first execution.

active_departments.name: growth
active_departments.current_focus: Maintain approved launch/copy posture and avoid routing placeholder review requests.

active_departments.name: brand
active_departments.current_focus: Stay in maintenance review mode for materially revised launch/lifecycle/onboarding copy only.

active_departments.name: vizops
active_departments.current_focus: Publish compact operating visibility on pipeline state, active departments, and major workstreams.

active_departments.name: ui-integration
active_departments.current_focus: Support integration closure between approved product structure and implemented UI surfaces.

active_departments.name: parity-qa
active_departments.current_focus: Narrow verification to evidence normalization and mismatch support where CTO needs operational confirmation.

major_workstreams.name: frontend binding
major_workstreams.summary: Frontend is unblocked to proceed from CTO evidence-based confirmation and platform-supplied repo context.

major_workstreams.name: artifact-pack regeneration
major_workstreams.summary: Head-of-product artifact-pack regeneration is the canonical product reference for this cycle.

major_workstreams.name: backend mismatch review
major_workstreams.summary: Backend is reviewing visible artifacts only and is not issuing further header-only publication requests this cycle.

major_workstreams.name: inaccessible-artifact audit
major_workstreams.summary: Company is explicitly treating inaccessible or omitted artifact text as non-operative and auditing decisions against visible evidence.

major_workstreams.name: launch/copy maintenance
major_workstreams.summary: Growth and Brand remain in maintenance mode around the approved launch-leading copy baseline.

major_workstreams.name: dashboard ops visibility
major_workstreams.summary: Vizops is maintaining the compact operating snapshot as the current visibility layer for company execution.
